Synthetic PP&D Public Permit Guide Home Netherlands Permitting & Development Get a Permit Synthetic PP&D Public Permit Guide Synthetic PP&D Public Permit Guide Published May 1, 2026 Updated May 8, 2026 Before you apply Use this synthetic public guidance page to review permit steps before starting a request. Workflow diagram for a synthetic permit request. Prepare your request Confirm the property address and permit type. Prepare plan sheets, calculations, and application documents. Review acknowledgements before any official submission. Important review note Do not upload, certify, submit, or pay fees until a person confirms the official action. Documents and timing Required public review documents Document When required Upload note Application form Every request Upload as a separate PDF. Plan set Projects with plan review Combine drawing sheets into one PDF. Contact permit help PP&D Permit Help Phone: 503-823-7300 Email: ppdpermithelp@example.invalid Hours: Monday through Friday, 8 a.m. to 4 p.m. Related links Apply for permits Submit plans online
